MAKRAS and FARAH MAKRAS's Motion To Compel Attendance Of Plaintiff Alexander Garcia At Deposition And The Production Of Documents, And For Monetary And/Or Evidentiary Sanctions Continued to August 25, 2017 to be referred to the discovery referee after the appointment of the referee is finalized.= (501/CPK)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW S. CANTOR VS. SEAN KOMARMY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 25, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANTs SEAN KOMARMY and VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED. No opposition filed.= (501/CPK)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW S. CANTOR VS. SEAN KOMARMY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 25, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANTs SEAN KOMARMY and VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and overruled in part. Requests for Judicial Notice are GRANTED. Demurrer is sustained as to negligence cause of action for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of this cause of action so that it is distinct from the cause of action for negligent misrepresentation, i.e. adds something to the complaint by way of fact or theory of recovery. Demurrer is sustained as to the cause of action for Negligent Misrepresentation for Plaintiff to allege non-speculative damages. If Plaintiff cannot so allege in good faith in light of the current stage of construction - Attachment A requirements to Resolution 42-2016; list of existing permits (See Ex A to Defendant's RJN) - the action is not ripe for adjudication. See People ex rel. Department of Public Works v. Ayon (1960) 54 Cal.2d 217. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Complaint sufficiently alleges an actionable misrepresentation and justifiable reliance.= (501/CPK)

rulings.Case Title: XIAO ZHEN WU VS. KEITH HENRY ARMSTRONG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 25, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANTs KEITH ARMSTRONG and SUMMER SIMPSON's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden. No admissible evidence provided re: CC 1940.9, i.e. lack of written agreement re: utilities and lack of separate meters; and CC 1942.4(a)(4).= (501/CPK)
